H1.verdict: SUPPORTED — measurable domain structure in routing.

H2.verdict: SUPPORTED — routing load is imbalanced (dead/hot experts present).

H3.verdict: PARTIAL/FLAT — no strong monotonic depth trend; see peak layer.

H4.verdict: SUPPORTED — routing is low-margin / high-entropy (fragile selection).

H5.verdict: NOT SUPPORTED — domains use largely disjoint experts.

H6.verdict: SUPPORTED — routing fingerprints strongly encode domain.
